{# tech-dark.html — Modern dark theme for tech talks and developer presentations #} {% extends "base_reveal.html" %} {% set style = { "reveal_theme": "night", "font_heading": "'Inter', 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif", "font_body": "'Inter', 'SF Pro Text', sans-serif", "heading_color": "#6366f1", "text_color": "#f1f5f9", "accent_color": "#22d3ee", "link_hover": "#06b6d4", "table_header_bg": "#4338ca", "table_stripe_bg": "rgba(99,102,241,0.1)", "blockquote_bg": "rgba(99,102,241,0.08)", "code_bg": "#1e293b" } %} {% set transition = "convex" %} {% block extra_css %} body { background: #0f172a; } .reveal section[data-state="title-slide"] h1 { font-size: 2.5em; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #22d3ee); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .reveal pre { box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); border: 1px solid #334155; } .reveal code { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; } .reveal section[data-state="closing-slide"] h2 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #22d3ee, #6366f1); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } {% endblock %}
